name: ruby-public-suffix
title: ruby-public-suffix
summary: Domain name parser based on the Public Suffix List
description:
Domain name parser based on the Public Suffix List
PublicSuffix can parse and decompose a domain name into top level domain,
domain and subdomains.
.
The Public Suffix List is a catalog of certain Internet domain names.
The term is also known by the form effective top-level domain (eTLD).
This list is used for the security and privacy policies of web application.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-public-suffix because Domain name parser based on the Public Suffix List.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-public-suffix as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-public-suffix with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-public-suffix --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
